_metadata.description: Parser pattern templates for BioThings data plugins. Match datasource to closest pattern.
_metadata.source: Extracted from production plugins in pending.api and mydisease.info

patterns.name: Simple CSV/TSV with groupby
patterns.when: Multiple TSV files share a grouping key; merge rows into one doc per entity

patterns.name: Pandas groupby for multi-row aggregation
patterns.when: Large gzip TSV; multi-level groupby; set deduplication (e.g. pubmed IDs)

patterns.name: Variant HGVS ID generation
patterns.when: Variant data with chromosomal coordinates; VCF-to-HGVS conversion

patterns.name: Cross-API ID resolution
patterns.when: Source IDs need mapping to BioThings canonical IDs (e.g. DOID→MONDO, UMLS→MONDO)

patterns.name: Multi-file CSV with deduplication
patterns.when: data_url is a list of CSVs with potential ID overlap between files

patterns.name: JSON with orjson
patterns.when: Source is JSON (not tabular); large files benefit from orjson speed

patterns.name: Pre-dumped JSON files
patterns.when: data_folder contains JSON files pre-staged by user; parser-side only (manifest still uses bulk download)
patterns.note: API-crawling dumper.py is backlog — see BACKLOG.md

pattern_selection.data_format: TSV, multiple files, shared grouping key
pattern_selection.record_structure: Merge into one doc per key

additional_rules: Use biothings.utils.common.open_anyfile for transparent .gz handling without pandas
Large files: streaming csv.DictReader or chunked pd.read_csv(chunksize=100000)
Convert numpy.int64 to Python int before yielding
Replace NaN with None: df = df.where(pd.notnull(df), None)
Code style: PEP8, max line 160, import groups: stdlib / third-party / biothings
